Who am I?

About Me

I am a Full Stack Web Developer currently pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at Lovely Professional University. I build responsive, secure, and scalable applications that streamline workflows and improve user experiences.

I have a strong foundation in C++, Java and JavaScript, and I actively build with React.js and Node.js. I am a team player who thrives in collaborative environments — I enjoy working with others to turn complex requirements into polished, production-ready products.

Beyond academics, I hold 3 industry certifications (Oracle, NPTEL, freeCodeCamp) and earned Grade A in DSA at LPU. I regularly practice competitive coding to sharpen my analytical skills.

🌍
Based in Bihar, India · Studying at LPU Punjab

Project 03 · 2025
Enhanced 3D Sorting Visualizer

Interactive 3D visualization tool that animates 6 sorting algorithms in real-time using isometric CSS cubes — Bubble, Selection, Insertion, Merge, Quick, and Heap Sort. Features step-by-step control and live counters.

HTML/CSSJavaScriptCSS 3DDSA

Project 04 · 2025
EventZone — College Event Platform

Full-stack event management platform connecting colleges with events. Features student portal with event discovery, profile management, a separate admin panel for managing events, organizers, and a live theme customizer.
